name: Drag-Along Rights
text: If the Majority Shareholders (holding more than seventy-five percent (75%) of the issued and paid-up share capital) ('Dragging Shareholders') receive a bona fide offer from a third party to acquire one hundred percent (100%) of the shares of the Company, the Dragging Shareholders shall have the right to require all other Shareholders ('Drag-Along Shareholders') to sell their shares to such third party on the same price, terms and conditions as accepted by the Dragging Shareholders ('Drag-Along Right'). The Dragging Shareholders shall give not less than thirty (30) days' prior written notice to the Drag-Along Shareholders before exercising the Drag-Along Right. The Drag-Along Shareholders shall be obligated to execute all documents and take all steps necessary to give effect to the sale within the period specified in the notice. The drag-along price per share shall not be less than the price per share offered to the Dragging Shareholders.

legal_basis.act: Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

invalid_if: Price protection for minority shareholders is absent
